actionCalls.name: Send_Closed_IS_Email_to_Client_Reporting
actionCalls.label: Send Closed IS Email to Client Reporting

value.stringValue: Your Translation Request is past due

formulas.name: CRMEmails
formulas.expression: IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'English'), {!$Record.CreatedBy.Email}, IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'Spanish'), 'workgroup.crmspain@carmignac.com', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'Portuguese'), 'workgroup.crmspain@carmignac.com', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'Italian'), 'workgroup.crmitaly@carmignac.com', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'Dutch'), 'workgroup.crmbeneluxnordics@carmignac.com', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'German'), 'workgroup.crmgermany@carmignac.com', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'French'), {!$Record.CreatedBy.Email}, 'SalesforceSupport@carmignac.com')))))))

formulas.name: GetQueueName
formulas.expression: IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'English'), 'UK_Translation_Queue', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'Spanish'), 'SP_PT_Translation_Queue', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'Portuguese'), 'SP_PT_Translation_Queue', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'Italian'), 'IT_Translation_Queue', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'Dutch'), 'NL_Translation_Queue', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'German'), 'DE_Translation_Queue', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sub_Target_language__c}, 'French'), 'FR_Translation_Queue', 'Translation_Queue_Admin')))))))

formulas.name: ProofreadingRecipients
formulas.expression:
IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue Admin', 'SalesforceSupport@carmignac.com',
IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue DE', 'workgroup.crmgermany@carmignac.com',
IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue FR', 'workgroup.crmfrance@carmignac.com',
IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue IT', 'workgroup.crmitaly@carmignac.com',
IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue NL', 'workgroup.crmbeneluxnordics@carmignac.com',
IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue SP PT', 'workgroup.crmspain@carmignac.com',
IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue UK', 'workgroup.crmuk@carmignac.com',
{!$Record.Owner:User.Email}
)))))))

formulas.name: RecipientIDs
formulas.expression: IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue Admin', 'SalesforceSupport@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue DE', 'workgroup.crmgermany@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue FR', 'workgroup.crmfrance@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue IT', 'workgroup.crmitaly@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue NL', 'workgroup.crmbeneluxnordics@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue SP PT', 'workgroup.crmspain@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue UK', 'workgroup.crmuk@carmignac.com', {!$Record.Owner:User.Email} )))))))

formulas.name: ReminderRecipients
formulas.expression: IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue Admin', 'SalesforceSupport@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue DE', 'workgroup.crmgermany@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue FR', 'workgroup.crmfrance@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue IT', 'workgroup.crmitaly@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue NL', 'workgroup.crmbeneluxnordics@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue SP PT', 'workgroup.crmspain@carmignac.com', IF( {!$Record.Owner:Group.Name} = 'Translation Queue UK', 'workgroup.crmuk@carmignac.com', {!$Record.Owner:User.Email} )))))))

start.filterLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (3 AND (4 OR 6)) OR (7 AND 8) OR (2 AND 3) OR (7 AND 9) OR (7 AND 10) AND 5

textTemplates.name: BodyCRMAgencyRequest
textTemplates.text:
Dear CRM Team,


We have a ﻿new translation request via translation Agencies : [Name + email address].


Request Details:

  • Type of Document: {!$Record.Document_Type__c}
  • Target Language: {!$Record.Target_languages__c}
  • Translation Mode: {!$Record.Translation_mode__c}
  • Deadline: {!$Record.DueDate__c}
  • Requester: {!$Record.Owner:User.FirstName} {!$Record.Owner:User.LastName}


Actions to Take:

  • Assign the WTP to the CRM who will be in charge of the request.
  • Monitor the translation process with the agency to ensure deadlines are met.
  • Conduct proofreading.
  • Close the WTP to complete the process.


Track team progress by checking our monitoring dashboard: [Insert link to dashboard here].


Thank you,


Best regards,

textTemplates.name: BodyCRMDeeplRequest
textTemplates.text:
Dear CRM Team,

We have a new translation request via DeeplPro 

Request Details:

Type of Document: {!$Record.Document_Type__c}

Target Language: {!$Record.Target_languages__c}

Translation Mode: {!$Record.Translation_mode__c}

Deadline: {!$Record.DueDate__c}

Requester: {!$Record.Owner:User.FirstName} {!$Record.Owner:User.LastName}

Actions to Take:

- Assign the WTP to the CRM who will be in charge of the request.

- Perform the translation with DeeplPro in the target language.

- Conduct proofreading.

- Upload the content onto the platform.

- Close the WTP to complete the process.

Track team progress by checking our monitoring dashboard: [Insert link to dashboard here].

Thank you,

Best regards,

textTemplates.name: ClosedBody
textTemplates.text:
Hello,

The request {!$Record.Subject} has been completed

Details reminder :

  • Request Type : {!$Record.Translation_Request_Type__c}
  • Document Type : {!$Record.Document_Type__c}

Kind regards

Salesforce Support

textTemplates.name: EmailReminder
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Name},

This is a kind reminder that your Translation Request "{!$Record.Subject}" has past it's due date : {!$Record.DueDate__c}.

Please complete the translation or follow up with the Translation Agency and close the Request.

Kind regards,

Salesforce Support

textTemplates.name: PreviewBody
textTemplates.text:
Dear CRM Team,

The preview for the publication request {!$Record.Subject} is ready.

Webesite Type : {!$Record.Website_Type__c}

Website Subtype : {!$Record.Website_SubType__c}

Target Website : {!$Record.TargetWebsite__c}

Due Date : {!$Record.DueDate__c}

Priority : {!$Record.Priority}

Requester : {!$Record.CreatedBy.FirstName} {!$Record.CreatedBy.LastName}

Please review the content, give feedback if needed (Chatter) and validate the preview ("Confirm Publication" button).

The Webhelp team will be notified and will proceed to publish the content.

Kind regards,

Salesforce Support

textTemplates.name: ProofreadingBody
textTemplates.text:
Hello,


The Translation Agency {!$Record.Account.Name} has responded to our Translation Request for WTP : {!$Record.Subject}

Please proceed to proofreading stage and validate the content.

The due date to complete this task is {!$Record.DueDate__c}.


Kind regards,


Salesforce Support

textTemplates.name: ProofreadingSubject
textTemplates.text: {!$Record.Account.Name} has responded to your translation request

textTemplates.name: SubjectCRMAgencyRequest
textTemplates.text: Translation Request via translation Agencies for {!$Record.Document_Type__c}

textTemplates.name: ValidatedBody
textTemplates.text:
Hello,

The preview for the publication request "{!$Record.Subject}" has been validated by {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

You can now proceed with publication

Kind regards,

Salesforce Support

textTemplates.name: ValidatedSubject
textTemplates.text: Your Content Preview has been validated

textTemplates.name: WebHelpNewBody
textTemplates.text:
Dear WebHelp Team,

You have a new publication request from {!$Record.CreatedBy.FirstName} {!$Record.CreatedBy.LastName}


Request Details:

  • Website Type : {!$Record.Website_Type__c}
  • Website Sub Type : {!$Record.Website_SubType__c}
  • Target Website : {!$Record.TargetWebsite__c}
  • Deadline: {!$Record.DueDate__c}
  • Priority : {!$Record.Priority}

Instructions : {!$Record.Instructions__c}

Actions to Take:

  • A Webhelp Team member must "Accept" the record to claim ownership.
  • The Webhelp owner will build the publication preview according to the provided instructions.
  • The Webhelp owner will inform the requester that the preview is ready (e.g., via Salesforce Chatter by using @RequesterName).
  • The requester will review and give their approval.
  • The Webhelp owner will publish the content and close the request by updating the current status to "Published."

See the full record detail here : {!RecordLink}

Thank you,

Best regards,
